EXPLORE AND VIEW OUR

POPULAR PACKAGES

  • Cairo - Luxor - Aswan

SOLAR ECLIPSE 2027

Embark on a once-in-a-lifetime journey through Egypt timed perfectly to experience the awe-inspiring Total Solar Eclipse of August 2, 2027. This 11-day adventure combines Egypt’s most iconic wonders with a celestial phenomenon rarely witnessed in such a dramatic setting. Begin in Cairo, where you’ll marvel at the Pyramids of Giza, the enigmatic Sphinx, and the world-renowned Grand Egyptian Museum. Continue with a guided exploration of the Citadel of Saladin and the historic treasures of Old Cairo, while enjoying 5-star accommodations with panoramic Nile views. Then take a short flight to Aswan to begin a luxurious 7-night cruise along the Nile aboard the M/S Mojito—an elegant floating hotel that carries you through the timeless landscapes of Upper Egypt. 


As you sail from Aswan to Luxor, each day delivers new marvels—from the grandeur of Philae Temple and Kom Ombo’s twin gods to the splendor of the Temple of Horus in Edfu. On Eclipse Day, you'll be perfectly positioned for a professionally arranged viewing experience, complete with expert commentary and all necessary equipment to safely observe the dramatic blackout of the sun against ancient Egyptian backdrops. Optional excursions, such as the breathtaking Abu Simbel temples, provide further enrichment for those seeking deeper discovery. With every moment curated for comfort, wonder, and insight, the Solar Eclipse 2027 package is more than a vacation—it’s a celestial pilgrimage through history’s most enduring civilization. 

Read MoreEgypt
  • Johannesburg - Durban - Oudtshoorn - Cape Town - Mpumalanga - Hluhluwe - Knysna

THE WONDERS OF SOUTH AFRICA

Travel to Africa to enjoy a profound two-week South Africa vacation tour adventure experiencing the wonders of South Africa. Discover Blyde River Canyon, Bourke’s Luck Potholes, and historic God’s Window in the Mpumalanga Province at Kruger National Park. Join in an open vehicle safari with the chance to see rhinos, buffalos, lions, leopards, and elephants. Delve into the unique indigenous culture of Swaziland and shop for distinctive crafts in the Ezulwini Valley. Opt for a game drive in the Umfolozi Game Reserve, famous for black and white rhinos. In Durban, bask in the golden beaches of the Indian Ocean. Explore Tsitsikamma National Park and Storms River Mouth on the way to Knysna. Visit an ostrich farm and the caverns of Cango Caves in Oudtshoorn. From Cape Town, embark on a full day exploration of Peninsula. All you’ve longed to experience awaits you on this in-depth South Africa travel package with Central Holidays.

Read MoreSouth Africa
  • Venice - Florence - Rome

ITALY'S NORTHERN HIGHLIGHTS

Travel on this, one of our best Italy vacation tour packages and revel in renowned attractions and exquisite sites from Doge's Palace in Venice where travelers will see the beautiful rooms decorated by 16 century artists, to Piazza Della Signoria in Florence, and the iconic Sistine Chapel in Rome, plus so much more during your 9-day immersion into "la dolce vita!" Central Holidays’ Northern Italy vacation packages take travelers to live the tapestry of sights, sounds, flavors, and feelings of the true Italy. Travel via deluxe motorcoach and stay in well-appointed, centrally-located first class hotels on all of our Italy travel packages like this inspired escorted travel program. Enjoy Italy's renowned cuisine at each lunch or dinner, featuring included extras such as wines, mineral water, coffee or cappuccino. Your heart and soul will delight in the unforgettable sights along the way: Piazza San Marco in Venice, Michelangelo's masterpiece of the David at the Accademia in Florence and the ceiling frescoed by the artist in the Sistine Chapel in Rome, the grandeur of St. Peter's Square in Vatican City, St. Francis' town of Assisi, and so much more! Come discover virtually unlimited art, monuments, landmarks, side walk cafes, trattorias, and places to mingle with Venetians, Florentines, and Romans in Italy every step of the way on this exciting Italian adventure.

ABOUT US!

Discover the world with Central Holidays, a trusted travel brand with over 50 years of experience. We specialize in carefully curated travel programs that cover a diverse range of global destinations. As passionate travelers ourselves, we are dedicated to providing uniquely authentic experiences that let you explore new cultures and landscapes.


Central Holidays is synonymous with exceptional service, in-depth destination knowledge, and well-designed travel packages that balance luxury with affordability. When you book with us, you're choosing a reliable tour operator with a longstanding reputation for excellence. Our commitment to your satisfaction extends from your initial inquiry to the moment you return from your adventure.

With offices in the United States, Italy, Egypt, and expert staff throughout Europe, Africa, Western Asia, and Latin America, we ensure seamless travel experiences. Whether it's planning your itinerary, managing on-the-ground logistics, or offering support during your trip, we're here to make your journey unforgettable. Trust Central Holidays to guide you through your next adventure.
